lever: de-delegate: average over the native all_pairs_node_connectivity result (byte-correct undirected, ~2x faster than nx's pure-Python O(n^2) max-flow loop) instead of re-delegating the whole computation to nx
notes: byte-EXACT (==) across undirected + directed + edge cases. mean over combinations (undirected) / permutations (directed) of the per-pair native connectivity. directed + custom flow_func delegate inside all_pairs_node_connectivity (native over-reports directed). 43 connectivity pytest pass.
